title: crossostylis seemannii
intro: Crossostylis seemannii, also known as the Crossostylis tree or Hawaiian crossostylis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the islands of Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crossostylis seemannii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Crossostylis seemannii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
